## edu-cli class request list

List join requests for a class

```
edu-cli class request list [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --class-id uint   Class ID (required)
  -h, --help            help for list
      --page int        Page number (default 1)
      --page-size int   Page size (default 20)
```
